app_tagline: Voluntary, beautiful ads built for you
hero_title: Discover campaigns you actually asked to see.
hero_description: Follow brands, toggle categories, and let the feed surprise you. Your attention is the currency— pick where you want to spend it.
spotlight_headline: Test drive the all-electric Verge at your doorstep.
proximity_desc: Simulate walking near local hotspots to trigger geofenced deals.
feed_disabled: Feed-based placements are disabled in your Ad Controls.
feed_empty: No social posts or campaigns found. Try tuning your preferences!
reward_success_toast: Successfully completed! +50 points added to your balance.
ad_skipped_toast: Ad skipped. We'll show less of this.
no_comments: No comments yet. Be the first!
privacy_guarantee: Privacy Guarantee: Your query will be sent anonymously under user handle {name}. The business will not see your email, phone, or name unless you write them below.
msg_placeholder: Hi, I'm interested in this offer. Could you share more details?
callback_placeholder: e.g. Email/Phone (only if you want a direct reply)
inquiry_sent_failed: Failed to submit inquiry. Please try again.
coupon_wallet_desc: Show barcodes at checkout to claim your rewards in-store.
coupon_wallet_empty: No redeemed vouchers yet. Use your points in the store below!
coupon_update_failed: Failed to update coupon in database.
proximity_drop_desc: Proximity Drop: Scratch card to unlock coupon & claim +50 bonus pts!
points_awarded_proximity: Points awarded for claiming proximity deal!
vibe_check_desc: Swipe cards to refine your ad categories and earn points instantly.
preferences_updated_desc: You have finished all preference poll cards. Your vibes are completely synchronized.
privacy_shield_desc: Applies client-side Local Differential Privacy (30% noise) to preference database entries, guaranteeing mathematical anonymity.
ldp_active_toast: Plausible Deniability Active: Your preference database sync was mathematically perturbed. +{amount} Points awarded!
saved_offers_redemption: You have {count} saved offers pending redemption.
history_empty: No history yet. Start engaging with ads to earn points!
marketplace_subtitle: Redeem your attention for real value.
marketplace_empty: No matching perks found. Try adjusting your filters.
wallet_empty_desc: Save ads in the feed by clicking the ★ icon.
ad_frequency_desc: Control how often sponsored drops and native campaigns populate your feed.
low_explain: 🐢 Low: Fewer ad insertions. Focuses only on highly matched preferences.
high_explain: 🚀 High: Max drops. Optimized to build rewards fast.
delivery_channels_desc: Enable or disable direct ad placements by channel.
feed_placements_desc: Display native cards directly in your content feed.
geofenced_alerts_desc: Receive proximity card pop-ups when walking near saved locations.
push_notifications_desc: Simulated push delivery for real-time campaign alerts.
quiet_hours_desc: Temporarily mute proximity triggers during specific times.
lang_pref_desc: Choose your preferred language for the interface and ad content.
privacy_ledger_desc: As a privacy-first platform, your real identity is never exposed. Review your anonymous profile ledger and manage your consent.
forget_me_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete your anonymous profile footprint? This will permanently erase all your data, preferences, coupons, history, and reset your account.
poll-1_question: Do you prefer ordering food from local family-owned eateries over large fast-food chains?
poll-2_question: Do you enjoy testing early-stage SaaS productivity tools and developer utilities?
poll-3_question: Are you actively looking to purchase or lease an affordable electric vehicle (EV)?
poll-4_question: Is it important to you to support veteran-owned or locally sourced businesses?
poll-5_question: Do you follow gaming tournaments, esports leagues, or play console/PC games regularly?
poll-6_question: Are you interested in personal finance optimization tips, budget tracking, or investment plans?
poll-7_question: Do you prioritize organic ingredients, daily fitness goals, or holistic wellness routines?
redeem_success_toast: Successfully claimed: {name}! Code is stored in your wallet.
perk_coffee_desc: Grab a warm cup of coffee on us.
perk_adfree_desc: Mute all ad placements in your feed for 24 hours.
perk_amazon_desc: Save on your next Amazon purchase.
perk_uber_desc: Order takeout delivered straight to your door.
perk_local_desc: Claim a discount voucher from local merchant {brand}.
preferences_desc: Tune your algorithm. Select the categories you want to see in your feed.
no_active_coupons: No active coupons yet. Go to the Rewards Hub to redeem your points!
controls_desc: Customize your ad delivery settings, quiet hours, and channel notifications.
purge_success_toast: All data permanently purged! Returning to landing page.
